backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing the Truth-Lens backend with user profile management, URL/text scanning, and admin session handling, all protected by role-based access control via MixinAuthorization.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping three implemented features (branding removal, admin dashboard, admin login page) to their relevant source files, components, and test IDs with high confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries for each frontend source file, serving as a reference index for the project's React/TypeScript frontend components and pages.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes, covering background, foreground, card, primary, and sidebar color tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the Truth-Lens SPA, mounting the React app at the #root div and loading the main TypeScript entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with all application routes (landing, scan, results, admin login, admin dashboard) wrapped in ThemeProvider and Toaster.
frontend/src/components/admin/SiteConfig: An admin tab that fetches and displays editable configuration fields (e.g., scan limits, maintenance mode) from the backend actor and saves dirty changes via `useSaveSiteConfig`.
frontend/src/components/admin/Submission: An admin tab that lists all scan submissions in a table and allows admins to delete individual entries with a confirmation dialog using `useDeleteSubmission`.
frontend/src/components/admin/UserManage: Admin tab component that displays a sortable table of registered users with ban and delete actions, using confirmation dialogs and toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/FeaturesGrid.tsx: Renders a responsive three-column grid of feature cards (Real-time Detection, Deepfake Analysis, URL Phishing Scan) with images, titles, and descriptions using shadcn Card components.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer displaying the Truth-Lens copyright, tagline, and a required caffeine.ai attribution link with UTM parameters and a heart icon.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky navigation header with the Truth-Lens logo, links to Scan and Admin pages, and an Internet Identity login/logout button that clears the query cache on logout.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Root layout wrapper that composes Header, a flex-growing main Outlet, and Footer to provide consistent page structure across all routes.
frontend/src/components/LoadingSpinner.t: Reusable animated spinner component using Lucide's Loader2 icon with configurable sm/md/lg sizes and cyber-themed primary color styling.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupDial: A modal dialog that prompts new users to enter their name to complete profile setup, using the `useSaveCallerUserProfile` mutation and blocking dismissal until saved.
frontend/src/components/ProtectedRoute.t: A route guard component that redirects unauthenticated users to the admin login page and shows an access-denied screen with logout option if the authenticated user is not an admin.
frontend/src/components/ScanForm.tsx: A form component with URL and text input tabs that submits content for analysis via `useScanAnalysis`, stores the result in sessionStorage, and navigates to the results page on success.
frontend/src/components/ScanResultsTable: A table component that displays a list of `ScanResult` objects with their content, safe/unsafe badge status, and confidence score.
frontend/src/components/TrustScoreDispla: A card component that visualizes an overall safety verdict and confidence score alongside per-source results (Google Safe Browsing, VirusTotal, PhishTank) with progress bars and badges.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, initializing it with the current Internet Identity and an optional admin token, then invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks for backend interactions, including user profile management, scan analysis, admin authentication, and user/scan result administration.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet defining Tailwind base imports, light/dark CSS custom properties for the design system, and cyberpunk-themed utility classes for glow and border effects.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboard.tsx: Admin dashboard page with a tabbed layout containing User Management, Submission Moderation, and Site Configuration tabs, plus a logout button.
frontend/src/pages/AdminLoginPage.tsx: Admin login page that requires Internet Identity authentication and verifies admin privileges via a mutation before redirecting to the admin dashboard. Handles login, logout, and access-denied error states.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: Marketing landing page with a hero section, features grid, and two CTAs that navigate users to the scan page.
frontend/src/pages/ResultsPage.tsx: Displays scan results retrieved from sessionStorage, showing a trust score and per-source verdicts from Google Safe Browsing, VirusTotal, and PhishTank.
frontend/src/pages/ScanDashboard.tsx: Authenticated scan dashboard that shows a loading state, an auth-required message for unauthenticated users, or the ScanForm with an optional profile-setup dialog for new users.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining a cyberpunk-themed design system with custom OKLCH colors, cyber glow box shadows, border radii, font families, and animation keyframes.
project_state.json: Tracks the Truth-Lens project state including existing features (watermark removal, admin dashboard UI, admin login page) and pending feature requests (backend admin operations, user management, submission moderation, site configuration). Defines project metadata, schema version, and feature/requirement mappings.
